title: agropyron glaucum
intro: Agropyron glaucum, also known as blue wheat grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agropyron glaucum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Agropyron glaucum can be found in the form of extracts, teas, and capsules, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
